prompt:

The next section is "Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations".

Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text: The Company issued warrants to purchase up to 40,534 shares of common stock to the placement agent of a registered direct offering on March 26, 2023. See “Part I – Item 1. Business – Recent Business Development – November 2022 Offering.”
